## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature or API
- [ ] Layout / rendering change

## Checklist

- [ ] `swift test` passes locally (deterministic suite — unit, integration, ASCII snapshots)
- [ ] If layout output changed, I re-recorded the affected snapshots intentionally and reviewed the diff
- [ ] New public API has `///` doc comments
- [ ] New behaviour has at least one test
- [ ] Change builds for all supported platforms (iOS / macOS / tvOS / watchOS / visionOS)
